name: Zesty Oil-Free Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the lowfat milk and tomato sauce.
2. Add the cider vinegar, lemon juice, parsley, onion, mustard, salt, and black pepper to the bowl.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
4. Refrigerate the dressing for at least 30 minutes before using to allow flavors to meld.
5. Serve over your favorite salad ingredients.
